response: This Python code implements a space-efficient probabilistic Bloom filter set membership data structure: it initializes a bit array of the specified size, adds items by marking bits at positions generated by the configured number of distinct hashes (each derived by appending an index to the item’s string form, hashing the result, then taking modulo the filter size), and checks for item membership by verifying all corresponding bit positions are set, which will never return a false negative but may produce false positives.
